query:
SELECT 'partners' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM partners
UNION ALL SELECT 'users', COUNT(*) FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'properties', COUNT(*) FROM properties
UNION ALL SELECT 'propertyProfiles', COUNT(*) FROM propertyProfiles
UNION ALL SELECT 'homeownerProfiles', COUNT(*) FROM homeownerProfiles
UNION ALL SELECT 'jobs', COUNT(*) FROM jobs
UNION ALL SELECT 'opportunities', COUNT(*) FROM opportunities
UNION ALL SELECT 'commissions', COUNT(*) FROM commissions
UNION ALL SELECT 'partnerReviews', COUNT(*) FROM partnerReviews
UNION ALL SELECT 'referralGraph', COUNT(*) FROM referralGraph;
